pages.text: Eight primary classes. One is picked at world creation. Every item the class owns has had its normal recipe removed; the class recipe is the only source.$(br2)$(l:classes/mage)Mage.$(/l) Combat spellcaster — wands, staves, robes, spell books.$(br2)$(l:classes/monk)Monk.$(/l) Combat holy-warrior — plate, staves, wands, magnum torches.$(br2)$(l:classes/warrior)Warrior.$(/l) Combat heavy-melee — Warrior and Berserker plate.$(br2)$(l:classes/ranger)Ranger.$(/l) Combat ranged — bows, crossbows, spears, scout armor.$(br2)$(l:classes/rogue)Rogue.$(/l) Combat stealth — shadow armor, daggers, grave-sentinel set.$(br2)$(l:classes/engineer)Engineer.$(/l) Craft industrial — picks a discipline: $(l:classes/eng_aeronautical)Aero$(/l), $(l:classes/eng_mechanical)Mech$(/l), $(l:classes/eng_electrical)Elec$(/l).$(br2)$(l:classes/armorer)Armorer.$(/l) Craft plate-armor — generic plate, kite shields, themed sets.$(br2)$(l:classes/blacksmith)Blacksmith.$(/l) Craft melee-weapons — claymores, maces, hammers, daggers, glaives, polearms.
